rows.label: tev021501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Tracy about her work as a Companion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Tracy if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Tracy about the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Tracy about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Tracy about the enemy attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0001
rows.name:
We investigate crimes and resolve
conflicts within the city walls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0002
rows.name:
The obvious analogy is that we're NLA's police force.
It's a very different job from the other Unions,
whose duties have them traveling throughout Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0003
rows.name:
So unlike those Unions, our members
are more likely to have been police
officers or detectives than military.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0004
rows.name:
In fact, I was recruited into the Union
because of my experience as a police
detective in the old Los Angeles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0005
rows.name:
I know what you're thinking—she must be a lot more
capable than she looks. And you're right! With my
detective's instincts, there's no crime I can't solve.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0006
rows.name:
So you'd best keep your own nose clean,
[ST:gender p1=pal p2=missy ]. If you try anything suspicious, I'll
figure it out in no time flat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0009
rows.name:
The industrial district is home to
the integrated production plant, a
vital piece of NLA infrastructure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0010
rows.name:
I spoke to a researcher there who was
bemoaning the insufficient amount of
Miran flora samples they've received.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0011
rows.name:
As it's my duty to patrol the city,
there was nothing I could do to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0012
rows.name:
But if you have spare time on
your hands, maybe you could
assist with sample collecting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0021
rows.name:
We've had complaints coming in from the residential
district—they claim it's frightening to have a
ship like that floating above the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0022
rows.name:
That was a decision handed down by HQ, so
there's nothing we can do about it. But I
can appreciate why they'd be concerned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0023
rows.name:
There's also been talk recently of
having a Ma-non join the Companion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0024
rows.name:
What does this mean for the
future of NLA? I hope things
don't get too weird around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Between the Ma-non and Nopon,
it's quite the menagerie of xenos
we have living with us now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Unfortunately, none of them seem to
have much understanding of Earth law.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0029
rows.name:
Does the prospect of xenoforms
bringing their own rules and
committing criminal acts disturb you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well, worry not! Companion Tracy and her detective's
instincts are on the beat. None of these scofflaws
will be getting away with anything under my watch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0031
rows.name:
I will protect NLA. I'm the
only woman for the job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0039
rows.name:
The attack has my detective's instincts
buzzing. Could there have been a collaboration
with local xenoforms behind the scenes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0040
rows.name:
Think about it—how could the enemy
have known the exact location of
the machine they wanted to steal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0041
rows.name:
Even within BLADE, only a
limited number of people had
access to that information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0042
rows.name:
So let's suppose, for example, that the Ma-non
who were "helping" us research the machine
passed that bit of information to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0043
rows.name:
Does that not sound like a possible
scenario? Or even...a plausible one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0044
rows.name:
Officially, our friendship treaty with the Ma-non prevents
me from acting on these suspicions. But what's to stop
me from pursuing an investigation off the books...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Tracy about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0045
rows.name:
At long last, a legitimate
threat has come to our city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0046
rows.name:
Look at those helmets! Those strange staff...thingies!
If we were back on Earth, any cop worth his badge
would have them under arrest in a country minute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0047
rows.name:
Nevertheless, Director General
Chausson has introduced them
as our newest friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0048
rows.name:
But as a part of the thin blue line that
separates NLA from chaos, I do not
acknowledge these "Zaruboggan" as friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0049
rows.name:
I know that they're up to something
nefarious... And I intend to prove it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Tracy for her thoughts on friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Tracy about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0050
rows.name:
After the destruction of Earth,
not everyone had the most positive
impression of alien races.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0051
rows.name:
So when they first came to the
city, many in NLA were understandably
apprehensive about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0052
rows.name:
But after they worked hand in hand with
us to defeat the Growth, things changed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0053
rows.name:
Now it seems that virtually
everyone in NLA accepts them
as true friends of humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0054
rows.name:
And thanks to the help of that
bighearted Shiraton, I was able to
clear up my own misunderstanding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0055
rows.name:
Now that I've had a chance to open a
proper dialogue, I'm proud of our
choice to forge pacts of friendship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0058
rows.name:
Though I suspect there are some in NLA who remain
prejudiced towards our Zaruboggan friends, I assure
you that I will not tolerate such behavior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0059
rows.name:
Sure, they may walk around the
city with strange helmets and
those little staff dealies...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0060
rows.name:
But to discriminate like that based on
appearances is shamefully small-minded![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0061
rows.name:
...Hmm? You're saying I used
to be that way myself?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021501_MSG0062
rows.name:
Can you puh-LEASE put the past behind you already?
You won't be able to move forward in life if
you're constantly looking over your shoulder![ST:wait ]
